creator: marino@FreeBSD.org
text:
There's a good chance that the MAKE_JOBS_UNSAFE has been fixed.  I know it's been fixed on trunk.

Basically the build targets were dependent on the "clean:" target and that caused the jobs safety issue.  That's been fixed.

The patch is approved but if you can double check if MAKE_JOBS_SAFE is still needed, that would be great.
